title: IPC Foundations & Channels Registry Refactoring
consumer_purpose: Eliminate all magic string IPC channel names across packages/desktop/ by creating a single source of truth registry, consolidating app identity, and extracting typed config accessors
claim_atoms: ALL magic strings in ipc.ts replaced with IPC.* references
ALL magic strings in preload/index.ts replaced with IPC.* references
ALL webContents.send calls in windows.ts use IPC.push.*
github-ipc.ts created with 6 GitHub OAuth handlers using IPC.handle.*
app-config.ts created with typed config accessors for GitHub client ID, health endpoint, custom protocol
constants.ts consolidated with APP_IDS, store names imported from ipc-channels
process.env.HOME in apps.ts replaced with app.getPath('home')
APP_IDS duplication removed from index.ts and migrate.ts (both import from constants)
Backward compatible: all literal string VALUES unchanged
TypeScript strict: IpcChannel union type exported for compile-time validation
content:
# IPC Foundations & Channels Registry Refactoring Plan (rev 5)

## Root Causes
1. **(BLOCKER)** github-ipc.ts imported but file missing — compilation error
2. **(HIGH)** 60+ magic string IPC channels across ipc.ts, preload/index.ts, windows.ts — zero constants
3. **(HIGH)** APP_IDS duplicated in index.ts and migrate.ts with different variable names
4. **(MEDIUM)** process.env.HOME in apps.ts — silently skips ~/Applications when HOME unset
5. **(MEDIUM)** homedir() manual OS paths in migrate.ts — duplicates app.getPath()

## Design: ipc-channels.ts

Pure (zero imports) string constant registry:

```typescript
export const IPC = {
  handle: {
    KILL_SIDECAR: "kill-sidecar",
    AWAIT_INITIALIZATION: "await-initialization",
    GET_WINDOW_CONFIG: "get-window-config",
    CONSUME_INITIAL_DEEP_LINKS: "consume-initial-deep-links",
    GET_DEFAULT_SERVER_URL: "get-default-server-url",
    SET_DEFAULT_SERVER_URL: "set-default-server-url",
    GET_WSL_CONFIG: "get-wsl-config",
    SET_WSL_CONFIG: "set-wsl-config",
    GET_DISPLAY_BACKEND: "get-display-backend",
    SET_DISPLAY_BACKEND: "set-display-backend",
    PARSE_MARKDOWN: "parse-markdown",
    CHECK_APP_EXISTS: "check-app-exists",
    WSL_PATH: "wsl-path",
    RESOLVE_APP_PATH: "resolve-app-path",
    RUN_UPDATER: "run-updater",
    CHECK_UPDATE: "check-update",
    INSTALL_UPDATE: "install-update",
    SET_BACKGROUND_COLOR: "set-background-color",
    EXPORT_DEBUG_LOGS: "export-debug-logs",
    SESSION_EXPORT_DATA: "session-export-data",
    SESSION_IMPORT_FILE: "session-import-file",
    RECORD_FATAL_RENDERER_ERROR: "record-fatal-renderer-error",
    STORE_GET: "store-get",
    STORE_SET: "store-set",
    STORE_DELETE: "store-delete",
    STORE_CLEAR: "store-clear",
    STORE_KEYS: "store-keys",
    STORE_LENGTH: "store-length",
    OPEN_DIRECTORY_PICKER: "open-directory-picker",
    OPEN_FILE_PICKER: "open-file-picker",
    SAVE_FILE_PICKER: "save-file-picker",
    OPEN_PATH: "open-path",
    READ_CLIPBOARD_IMAGE: "read-clipboard-image",
    GET_WINDOW_COUNT: "get-window-count",
    GET_WINDOW_FOCUSED: "get-window-focused",
    SET_WINDOW_FOCUS: "set-window-focus",
    SHOW_WINDOW: "show-window",
    GET_ZOOM_FACTOR: "get-zoom-factor",
    SET_ZOOM_FACTOR: "set-zoom-factor",
    GET_PINCH_ZOOM_ENABLED: "get-pinch-zoom-enabled",
    SET_PINCH_ZOOM_ENABLED: "set-pinch-zoom-enabled",
    SET_TITLEBAR: "set-titlebar",
    RUN_DESKTOP_MENU_ACTION: "run-desktop-menu-action",
    GET_DESKTOP_CUSTOM_AGENTS: "get-desktop-custom-agents",
    SET_DESKTOP_CUSTOM_AGENTS: "set-desktop-custom-agents",
    DELETE_DESKTOP_CUSTOM_AGENT: "delete-desktop-custom-agent",
    GET_DESKTOP_MCP_SERVERS: "get-desktop-mcp-servers",
    SET_DESKTOP_MCP_SERVERS: "set-desktop-mcp-servers",
    GET_DESKTOP_PLUGIN_CONFIG: "get-desktop-plugin-config",
    SET_DESKTOP_PLUGIN_CONFIG: "set-desktop-plugin-config",
    GITHUB_OAUTH_START: "github-oauth-start",
    GITHUB_OAUTH_CALLBACK: "github-oauth-callback",
    GITHUB_GET_TOKEN: "github-get-token",
    GITHUB_SET_TOKEN: "github-set-token",
    GITHUB_CLEAR_TOKEN: "github-clear-token",
    GITHUB_API_PROXY: "github-api-proxy",
  } as const,
  send: {
    OPEN_LINK: "open-link",
    SHOW_NOTIFICATION: "show-notification",
    RELAUNCH: "relaunch",
    LOADING_WINDOW_COMPLETE: "loading-window-complete",
  } as const,
  push: {
    INIT_STEP: "init-step",
    SQLITE_MIGRATION_PROGRESS: "sqlite-migration-progress",
    MENU_COMMAND: "menu-command",
    DEEP_LINK: "deep-link",
    PINCH_ZOOM_ENABLED_CHANGED: "pinch-zoom-enabled-changed",
    ZOOM_FACTOR_CHANGED: "zoom-factor-changed",
  } as const,
  store: {
    SETTINGS: "opencode.settings",
    DESKTOP_PLUGIN_CONFIG: "desktop-plugin-config",
    DESKTOP_CUSTOM_AGENTS: "desktop-custom-agents",
    DESKTOP_MCP_SERVERS: "desktop-mcp-servers",
    GITHUB_AUTH: "github-auth",
  } as const,
} as const

type IpcChannelGroups = "handle" | "send" | "push"
export type IpcChannel = {
  [G in IpcChannelGroups]: (typeof IPC)[G][keyof (typeof IPC)[G]]
}[IpcChannelGroups]

// Convenience subtypes for better type safety
export type IpcHandleChannel = (typeof IPC)["handle"][keyof (typeof IPC)["handle"]]
export type IpcSendChannel = (typeof IPC)["send"][keyof (typeof IPC)["send"]]
export type IpcPushChannel = (typeof IPC)["push"][keyof (typeof IPC)["push"]]
```

## Execution Plan (4 Waves)

### Wave A: Create new files (parallel)
1. **ipc-channels.ts** — CREATE pure string constant registry (zero imports)
2. **app-config.ts** — CREATE typed config accessors (GitHub client ID, health endpoint, custom protocol, app identity)
3. **github-ipc.ts** — CREATE 6 GitHub OAuth IPC handlers using IPC.handle.* and getGithubClientId()

### Wave B: Constants + store (depends on Wave A)
4. **constants.ts** — Import IPC.store.SETTINGS for SETTINGS_STORE, add APP_IDS record, export Channel type
5. **store.ts** — Import IPC.store.SETTINGS for default store name (replacing current literal)

### Wave C: IPC channel replacements (depends on Wave A)
6. **ipc.ts** — **DIRTY** Replace 50 ipcMain.handle + 4 ipcMain.on + 3 event.sender.send + RESERVED_STORE_NAMES with IPC.* references. Use search_replace ONLY. ~60 replacements.
7. **preload/index.ts** — **DIRTY** Replace 56 ipcRenderer.invoke + 4 ipcRenderer.send + 6 ipcRenderer.on/removeListener pairs with IPC.* references. Use search_replace ONLY. ~72 magic string references.
8. **windows.ts** — **DIRTY** Replace 2 webContents.send literals with IPC.push.PINCH_ZOOM_ENABLED_CHANGED and IPC.push.ZOOM_FACTOR_CHANGED.

### Wave D: Identity + path cleanup (depends on Wave B)
9. **index.ts** — Delete local APP_IDS, import from ./constants, use APP_IDS.dev fallback
10. **migrate.ts** — Delete TAURI_APP_IDS, import APP_IDS from constants, replace homedir() with app.getPath("home")
11. **apps.ts** — Replace process.env.HOME with app.getPath("home")

## Risk Assessment

| Risk | Severity | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| Preload imports ipc-channels.ts with electron/node deps — runtime crash | HIGH | ipc-channels.ts is PURE — zero imports. Verify with: rg 'from "(electron\|node:)' ipc-channels.ts |
| Dirty ipc.ts loses GitHub OAuth extraction (82 lines) | HIGH | search_replace ONLY on channel string lines. Dirty region is import/typedef area — no overlap. |
| Dirty windows.ts loses @visibleForTesting exports | HIGH | Replace only webContents.send calls. Dirty region verified to not overlap. |
| Dirty preload/index.ts loses deleteCustomAgent | HIGH | search_replace only touches channel strings. New methods at bottom of file unaffected. |
| Rollback destroys dirty state | HIGH | Rollback uses git stash first: `git stash push -m "pre-rollback" -- dirty-file-list` before checkout |
| Missing handle handler registered but never called | MEDIUM | Add cross-ref validation: `grep -roh 'IPC\.handle\.\w*' src/main/ipc.ts src/main/github-ipc.ts | sort -u` vs `grep -roh 'IPC\.handle\.\w*' src/preload/index.ts | sort -u` |

## Validation Strategy

### Post-Wave-A validation
```bash
# 1. Zero imports check
rg 'from "(electron|node:)' packages/desktop/src/main/ipc-channels.ts
# Expected: no output

# 2. File existence check
ls -la packages/desktop/src/main/ipc-channels.ts packages/desktop/src/main/app-config.ts packages/desktop/src/main/github-ipc.ts
```

### Post-Wave-C validation
```bash
# 3. Zero ipcMain.handle magic strings
rg 'ipcMain\.handle\("' packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts || echo "OK"
rg 'ipcMain\.handle\("' packages/desktop/src/main/github-ipc.ts || echo "OK"

# 4. Zero ipcMain.on magic strings
rg 'ipcMain\.on\("' packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts || echo "OK"

# 5. Zero webContents.send magic strings in windows.ts
rg 'webContents\.send\("' packages/desktop/src/main/windows.ts || echo "OK"

# 6. Zero ipcRenderer.invoke magic strings in preload
rg 'ipcRenderer\.invoke\("' packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts || echo "OK"

# 7. Zero ipcRenderer.send magic strings in preload
rg 'ipcRenderer\.send\("' packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts || echo "OK"

# 8. Registry cross-ref: every handle used in preload has a registration
grep -roh 'IPC\.handle\.\w*' packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts | sort -u > /tmp/preload_handles.txt
grep -roh 'IPC\.handle\.\w*' packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts packages/desktop/src/main/github-ipc.ts | sort -u > /tmp/handlers.txt
diff /tmp/preload_handles.txt /tmp/handlers.txt
# Expected: no diff (every preload handle has a handler, every handler is used)
```

### Post-Wave-D validation
```bash
# 9. No APP_IDS in index.ts
rg 'const APP_IDS' packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts || echo "OK"

# 10. No TAURI_APP_IDS in migrate.ts
rg 'TAURI_APP_IDS' packages/desktop/src/main/migrate.ts || echo "OK"

# 11. No process.env.HOME in apps.ts
rg 'process\.env\.HOME' packages/desktop/src/main/apps.ts || echo "OK"

# 12. APP_IDS defined in constants.ts
rg 'export const APP_IDS' packages/desktop/src/main/constants.ts

# 13. TypeScript check
cd packages/desktop && bun typecheck
```

## Rollback Plan (with dirty file preservation)
```bash
# Step 1: Preserve dirty state from files we modified
git stash push -m "pre-rollback-dirty-state" \
  -- packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts \
     packages/desktop/src/main/windows.ts \
     packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts

# Step 2: Checkout all modified files to clean state
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/main/apps.ts
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/main/migrate.ts
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/main/constants.ts
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/main/store.ts
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/main/windows.ts
git checkout -- packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts

# Step 3: Remove new files
rm packages/desktop/src/main/github-ipc.ts
rm packages/desktop/src/main/app-config.ts
rm packages/desktop/src/main/ipc-channels.ts

# Step 4: Restore original dirty state
git stash pop
```
revision_notes: Rev 5: Fixed channel counts (preload: 56 invoke + 4 send + 6 on/removeListener = ~72 references, ipc.ts: 50 handle + 4 on = 54). Fixed rollback plan to preserve dirty state via git stash before checkout. Added IpcHandleChannel/IpcSendChannel/IpcPushChannel convenience subtypes. Added registry cross-reference validation step. Removed incorrect 'tests will break' claim from risk table.
